articles.title: XRP Has Same Use Cases As Bitcoin, Ripple Director Asserts
articles.description: Ripple’s native cryptocurrency, XRP, often gets a bad rep for having no real use cases, with some regulators going as far as to call it a security. In a series of tweets recently, the Director of Developer Relations at Ripple, Matt Hamilton, has attempted to set the record straight on the XRP cryptocurrency. XRP’s Use […]

articles.title: Shibu Inu (SHIB) DEX ShibaSwap surpasses $1B TVL 24-hours after launch
articles.description: 24-hours after launching, SHIB’s new ShibaSwap DeFi platform surpassed $1 billion in total value locked and it is raising fees on the Ethereum network.
